subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 1
subcodes.first_line: My hair beareth witness for My Beauty that verily I am God and that there is none other God but Me.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد شعری لجمالی بانی انا الله لا اله الا انا قد کنت فی ازل القدم الها فردا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment
